testcase.name: API Test Cases - Account Operations › @api @smoke TC-API-01 Create SAVINGS account
API Test Cases - Account Operations › @api @smoke TC-API-02 Create CHECKING account and response should reflect correct type
API Test Cases - Account Operations › @api @negative @regression TC-API-03 GET non-existent account and should return an error response
API Test Cases - Account Operations › @api @negative @regression TC-API-04 Create account with invalid customerId and should return an error response
